# linear_users (Data Source)

Linear users.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "linear_users" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) List of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the user is active.
- `admin` (Boolean) Whether the user is an admin.
- `display_name` (String) Display name of the user.
- `email` (String) Email of the user.
- `id` (String) Identifier of the user.
- `name` (String) Name of the user.
- `url` (String) URL of the user's profile.
